title: Assess candidate score changes with fixed and random evaluation evidence
description:
## Summary
As a score operator, I want candidate score changes assessed with both fixed deterministic evidence and random generalization evidence, so that I can tell whether an apparent improvement is real or merely overfit.

Feature: Staged candidate assessment
Scenario: Operator evaluates a candidate score change
Given a score with fixed deterministic datasets and a random-sampling policy
When the operator runs the optimization workflow for a candidate score version
Then Plexus should assess the candidate using both deterministic and random evidence
And it should present the combined result as one coherent assessment bundle

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Story completed: staged candidate assessment now implemented end-to-end (protocol definition, runner orchestration, canonical assessment bundle persistence, KPI/generalization metrics, dashboard surfaces, and docs/test coverage). Closing story.
